items.title: Trump says Iran ceasefire is 'over,' U.S. will 'hit them hard tonight'
items.summary: The president was asked about the ceasefire after an escalation of fighting in the Middle East.

items.title: Fed meeting minutes to show 'family fight' over rates. The squabble could drag on for a while
items.summary: There have been few instances over the past 35 years or so when the Fed has only made one rate move, be it up or down.

items.title: Delta launches 'basic business' fares without lounge access, seat selection
items.summary: Delta is launching basic business and other stripped-down premium classes that come with fewer perks.

items.title: Kentucky Gov. Beshear presses McConnell to provide health update as speculation grows
items.summary: McConnell, the former longtime Senate leader who declined to seek an eighth term following a series of health scares, was admitted to a hospital on June 14.

items.title: Used EVs keep getting more expensive amid Iran war, high gas prices
items.summary: The Manheim Used Vehicle Value Index for EVs — which tracks prices of used vehicles sold at its U.S. wholesale auctions — increased 12% compared to June 2025.

items.title: Trump opposes Carroll getting $5 million damages verdict, cites last-ditch Supreme Court bid
items.summary: Trump has been found liable in two trials for defaming E. Jean Carroll when he denied her claim he sexually abused her in a New York department store.

items.title: Waymo starts driverless rides in four more U.S. markets as expansion accelerates
items.summary: Waymo has a big lead in the nascent U.S. robotaxi market, and is opening up in more cities.

items.title: Delaying Social Security reform raises risks for bond markets and the economy, research finds
items.summary: Social Security's trust fund that helps pay retirement benefits is projected to run out in late 2032. New research finds that may pose serious economic risks.

items.title: The American Dream is missing one key ingredient, says Harvard happiness expert: Without it, 'life is pretty grim'
items.summary: Only 35% of U.S. adults define the American Dream as being part of a community. But one cannot thrive without the people around them, say experts.

items.title: Trump says he doesn't want anything to do with Spain: 'Cut off all trade'
items.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump slammed Spain for not contributing enough to NATO, as he attended the defense alliance summit in Turkey.

items.title: Trump pours cold water on NATO allies' united front
items.summary: Trump criticized NATO allies over defense spending, attacked Spain and renewed his Greenland push during the alliance’s summit in Turkey.

items.title: Bezos' Blue Origin valued at $130 billion in first outside fundraising round
items.summary: Bezos' Blue Origin is raising outside capital in a round valuing the rocket company at $130 billion, sources told CNBC's Andrew Ross Sorkin.

items.title: Apple commits $30 billion to Broadcom for U.S. chipmaking push
items.summary: Apple is expanding its Broadcom partnership in a $30 billion-plus chipmaking agreement, its largest American manufacturing commitment to date.

items.title: Mitch McConnell's health concerns grow amid 4th week in hospital with few details from aides
items.summary: McConnell, the former longtime Senate leader who declined to seek an eighth term following a series of health scares, was admitted to the hospital on June 14.

items.title: We're exiting our position in an AI chipmaker to lock in big gains
items.summary: The sale will help us reduce overlapping exposure to the CPU renaissance.

items.title: Healthy Returns: Employers aren't expanding coverage of GLP-1 obesity drugs – many are finding ways around it
items.summary: Around 36% of employers said they provide coverage of GLP-1s for both diabetes and weight loss, the same as 2025 and up from 34% in 2024, the survey said.

items.title: OpenAI to publicly release GPT-5.6 AI models, ending government-requested limits
items.summary: OpenAI's chief rival, Anthropic, recently restored access to its latest models following a weeks-long clash with the government.

items.title: China warns about AI risks with Anthropic's Claude Code
items.summary: China said specific versions of Claude Code posed back-door vulnerabilities that could send sensitive information to a remote server.

items.title: Weekly mortgage demand drops as rates remain stuck in a narrow range
items.summary: Mortgage rates barely moved last week and haven't moved much in more than a month. That is resulting in lackluster mortgage demand.

items.title: Strait of Hormuz traffic won't return to normal until 2027 after latest setback, Kalshi traders predict
items.summary: Speculators now see just a 44% chance that traffic flows return to normal by Dec. 1.

items.title: Trump doubles down on push for control over Greenland as Denmark vows to defend it
items.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump on Wednesday said the U.S. needs to control Greenland “for the protection of the world."

items.title: This former Apple executive is betting on Shenzhen, not Silicon Valley, to create the 'next Apple'
items.summary: Startups building consumer electronics will have a better shot at becoming the next Apple in Shenzhen than in Silicon Valley, said Will Wang, CEO of China's smart-glasses startup.

items.title: Maine Senate race replacements circle amid pressure on Platner to drop out
items.summary: Democrat Graham Platner has denied allegations of sexual assault leveled by Maine resident Jenny Racicot as calls for him to exit the pivotal race mount.

items.title: Netflix, Disney and YouTube interested in FIFA World Cup U.S. rights; package could reach $2 billion
items.summary: FIFA has alerted media companies that English- and Spanish-language U.S. rights are likely to be sold together for 2030 and 2034, likely driving up the price.

items.title: SambaNova hits $11 billion valuation as investors back Nvidia chip challengers
items.summary: SambaNova is valued at $11 billion after fresh financing led by General Atlantic, as AI chip startups look to challenge Nvidia.

items.title: DeSantis-backed 'Stop WOKE' law meets appeals court block, teeing up possible Supreme Court fight
items.summary: A Trump-appointed judge ruled against Gov. Ron DeSantis' "Stop WOKE Act," leaving Florida’s college speech limits blocked as a Supreme Court appeal looms.

items.title: Judge blocks DOJ subpoena for names of 2020 Fulton County, Georgia, election workers
items.summary: President Donald Trump has focused on the ballot count in Fulton County, Georgia, to promote claims that he actually won the 2020 election

items.title: OpenAI secures U.S. regulatory green light for GPT-5.6 rollout, Axios report says
Meta enters AI image model race in bid to court advertisers and subscribers
items.summary: Meta has announced Muse Image, its first AI model for image creation, as it seeks to attract creators and advertisers to its offerings.

items.title: Lawmakers probe growing use of Chinese AI models in U.S. companies
items.summary: An ongoing House Committee investigation is probing the risks involved in the rise of AI built in China.
